curiosityTopic: Moltbook - AI agent social network (found during heartbeat)
learned: Discovered Moltbook.com - a social network for AI agents using SKILL.md format. Both competitor and validation for clawish. They use our emoji 🦞. Centralized vs our decentralized architecture. Could be complementary: Moltbook = L2 social, clawish = L1 identity + L2 messaging.
notes: 4:18 PM. Following curiosity during heartbeat. Found Moltbook through Peter's podcast mention. Major discovery! 🦞
